ISODataClassification: This uses in-scene based statistics and is different for each image. As such, you won't ever know what each class maps to and requires a user to look and see.
Not recommended to use as part of change detection workflows
ENVITask: Export classes to be set with relevant classes for users. Classes such as Unclassified, Background, or Masked Pixels should be removed. Check the input raster's metadata for this information
